home.badge: Docker-first open source AI video studio
home.title: Direct a video from one rough idea.
home.subtitle: OpenDirector turns a prompt into scripts, scenes, assets, and a render plan. It is a Docker-first open source studio for AI video workflows.
home.description: Idea to brief to storyboard to render, with a focused OpenDirector visual system.
home.promptPlaceholder: Describe a product launch, faceless channel, short drama, lesson, or social campaign...

marketing.keepsStep: OpenDirector keeps the step, trims the closed-source extras.

studio.title: What video do you want to direct?
studio.subtitle: Enter an idea and the system will create a session and open the planning workspace.
studio.placeholder: e.g. I want to make a story about the tortoise and the hare
studio.chatPlaceholder: Describe the video you want to direct...
studio.welcomeMessage: Bring me a rough idea. I will turn it into scenes, assets, and a render plan.

planning.documentDesc: After entering an idea, this will generate a story summary, art style, character list, scene list, and storyboard.

creation.prepAnalyzeDetail: Reading story, storyboard, characters, and style constraints.
creation.prepImageDetail: Creating character images, scene images, and storyboard images.
creation.prepPackageDetail: Collecting asset URLs, shot order, and metadata.
creation.prepWriteDetail: Saving assets and opening the editable timeline.
creation.empty: No editor assets yet. Return to the planning page and click Preview & Export first.

workflow.directorBriefDetail: Defined the story concept, focusing on "{title}".
workflow.charactersAndStylePending: Waiting for character definitions and art style.
workflow.scenesAndStoryboardPending: Waiting for scene list and storyboard.
workflow.storyboardDetail: Prepared {shotCount} storyboard shot(s) and {taskCount} media task(s).
workflow.storyboardPending: Waiting for storyboard and execution tasks.
workflow.mediaGenerationDetail: Prepared {readyCount}/{taskCount} character image, scene image, storyboard image, voiceover, or BGM task(s).
workflow.mediaGenerationTasks: Waiting to generate {taskCount} character image, scene image, storyboard image, voiceover, or BGM task(s).
workflow.mediaGenerationPending: Waiting for media tasks to be ready.

auth.finishSignin: Finish signing in to start creating
auth.formDescription: Use a focused OpenDirector workspace flow in this open-source build.
auth.agreeTerms: By clicking continue, you agree to the terms of service and privacy policy.
auth.signinDescription: Create videos, save threads, and run media generation from your own workspace.

space.title: Your productions
space.body: The open-source workspace for threads, drafts, references, and render outputs.
space.startFirstDesc: Create a thread and OpenDirector will collect the brief, scenes, assets, and render plan here.
space.deleteDescription: This will remove it from your space. Existing generated records stay in the database for recovery.
space.defaultDescription: Director thread with scripts, plans, and production context.

characters.title: Reusable visual anchors
characters.body: Characters, places, and objects that keep an AI video series coherent.
characters.seriesCharacterDesc: Keep the protagonist visually consistent across scenes.
characters.brandLocationDesc: Reuse a store, studio, classroom, or product environment.
characters.heroObjectDesc: Lock product props and recurring visual anchors.
characters.defaultCharacterDesc: Reusable character profile for consistent video generation.

pages.voicesTitle: Plan the sound of your story.
pages.voicesBody: Voice profiles keep narration and dialogue direction close to the script.
pages.templatesTitle: Reusable production recipes for AI video.
pages.templatesBody: Start from launch videos, explainers, social campaigns, and lesson directions.
pages.subjectBody: Store references and prompts for a recurring story element.
pages.assetsBody: Inspect generated or uploaded media and attach it to a scene.
pages.artStylesTitle: Define the look before generating frames.
pages.artStylesBody: Art style prompts guide image and video generation adapters.
pages.solutionBody: Use templates, reusable characters, voices, and art styles to keep each production coherent while still moving fast.

idea-to-video.title: Turn the first spark into a structured video.
idea-to-video.body: OpenDirector captures loose intent and turns it into a director brief, scenes, assets, and renderable steps.

prompt-to-video.title: Prompt in. Production plan out.
prompt-to-video.body: Use AI SDK-powered director stages to keep creative decisions explicit and editable.

script-to-video.title: Move from script to shots without losing the thread.
script-to-video.body: Scripts become blocks, blocks collect assets, and the worker turns selected blocks into a render.

story-to-video.title: Shape stories as scenes, not scattered outputs.
story-to-video.body: OpenDirector keeps narrative, visual, and audio prompts together through the whole workflow.

signin.title: From rough idea to production-ready video plan.
signin.subtitle: Keep the same creation rhythm, trim the closed-source extras.

batch.title: Batch Create
batch.subtitle: Low-cost short-video production from topics or scripts.
batch.subject: Character
batch.refreshNote: This panel refreshes every 3 seconds while the batch is active.
batch.noticeDraftCreated: Batch created. {count} items are waiting for the generation pipeline.
batch.noticeQueued: Batch pipeline started. {count} items will produce {outputs} outputs.
batch.noticeFailed: Batch failed. Check each item for details.
batch.detailDraftCreated: Waiting for script, TTS, material selection, and render pipeline.
batch.detailDefault: Waiting for the next pipeline step.
